blurb: Law-firm AI/regulatory practice. Launch coverage uses Out-Law AI-regulatory reporting from Pinsent Masons.

publications.title: EU AI simplification package reaches critical milestone
publications.summary: Pinsent Masons reports on the EU AI simplification package reaching a critical legislative milestone, a live signal for AI Act implementation and compliance advice.

publications.title: Guidelines support providers with ‘high-risk’ AI self-assessments
publications.summary: Pinsent Masons Out-Law reports on Commission high-risk AI classification guidelines and self-assessment duties under the AI Act.

controversies.title: Pinsent Masons self-reports to SRA after AI-hallucinated citations drew High Court admonishment
controversies.summary: The Law Society Gazette reported that Pinsent Masons and solicitors were referred to the SRA after an Insolvency and Companies Court judge publicly admonished the firm over AI-hallucinated authorities used in proceedings; the firm said it self-reported and cooperated.
controversies.rawExcerpt: A judge has said an Insolvency and Companies Court ruling should serve as public admonishment of international firm Pinsent Masons and senior lawyers, after two botched uses of artificial intelligence.
